heading: Omitted
label: 7531 to 7538 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 7531 to 7538 of this title were omitted pursuant to , which provided that the authority of this subchapter expired after .section 7538 of this titleSept. 30, 2006Section 7531, , , , related to sense of Congress regarding United States support for security during transition in Afghanistan.Pub.
